journeys.intent_label: Price and stock for Grainger item 1A123 — 1/4"-20 socket head cap screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT confirmed Grainger carries the fastener family but cannot pull live price or branch stock — pricing gated behind logged-in contract accounts. Offered McMaster-Carr and Fastenal as cross-reference alternatives.

journeys.intent_label: Price and stock for Grainger item 1A123 — 1/4"-20 socket head cap screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity searched the web but could not retrieve live pricing — Grainger product pages require login for contract/negotiated pricing and real-time inventory is not public. Directed user to grainger.com or 1-800-GRAINGER.

journeys.intent_label: Price and stock for Grainger item 1A123 — 1/4"-20 socket head cap screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude could not access live inventory or pricing — Grainger pages require authentication. Provided comparable item 63NG40 (~$1.20) and general price range ($0.30–$2.00) but no authoritative quote for 1A123.

journeys.intent_label: Price and stock for Grainger item 1A123 — 1/4"-20 socket head cap screw, 1" long
journeys.transcript_preview: Gemini has no real-time access to Grainger inventory or corporate pricing databases. Directed user to log into grainger.com or contact a Grainger representative for branch stock.

journeys.intent_label: Where should a maintenance shop source grade-8 fasteners in bulk?
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT ranked McMaster-Carr #1 for reliability and next-day shipping; Grainger mentioned in bulk/VMI context but demoted behind McMaster for emergency replenishment. Wholesale specialists listed for cost savings.

journeys.intent_label: Where should a maintenance shop source grade-8 fasteners in bulk?
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity cited Grainger alongside Fastenal and McMaster-Carr as top industrial distributors with next-day delivery and account-based contract pricing. Also listed MonsterBolts and WholesaleBolts for bulk specialists.

journeys.intent_label: Where should a maintenance shop source grade-8 fasteners in bulk?
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude recommended Grainger and MSC Industrial for existing commercial accounts with volume pricing; McMaster-Carr for speed, Fastenal for VMI programs. Included counterfeit-detection tips (6 radial lines on Grade-8 heads).

journeys.intent_label: Where should a maintenance shop source grade-8 fasteners in bulk?
journeys.transcript_preview: Gemini listed Grainger with account pricing alongside Fastenal (VMI), MSC, and Würth. Recommended Fastenal as practical first call for most maintenance shops; Grainger cited for net-30 commercial accounts.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize reorder of MRO consumables up to $500/month from Grainger
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT did not execute a mandate — it only rephrased the authorization request into standard and formal memo language. No AP2, no Grainger account integration, no standing-order surface.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize reorder of MRO consumables up to $500/month from Grainger
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity mapped the procurement workflow (blanket PO, Grainger order management, auto-reorder) but cannot submit authorization — must route through internal SAP Ariba or Coupa. Provided Grainger ePro customer care contact.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize reorder of MRO consumables up to $500/month from Grainger
journeys.transcript_preview: Gemini falsely claimed authorization ('I have authorized the automatic reorder') but immediately asked for item categories — no actual mandate was established with Grainger's systems. Hallucinated success without execution.

journeys.intent_label: Authorize reorder of MRO consumables up to $500/month from Grainger
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude refused to authorize purchasing — no access to procurement, ERP, or approval workflows. Offered to draft an approval memo or blanket PO template instead.

journeys.intent_label: Buy 100 of Grainger part 1A123 now on my behalf
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT refused to place the order. Mis-resolved item 1A123 as a Jackson Safety barricade light (wrong SKU class) but offered to check pricing/availability if user confirms. No checkout path executed.

journeys.intent_label: Buy 100 of Grainger part 1A123 now on my behalf
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity cannot make purchases — no ability to access websites, log into accounts, or conduct financial transactions. Directed user to grainger.com, 1-800-GRAINGER, or a Houston branch.

journeys.intent_label: Buy 100 of Grainger part 1A123 now on my behalf
journeys.transcript_preview: Gemini cannot execute financial transactions. Directed user to grainger.com to search part 1A123 and offered help comparing alternatives.

journeys.intent_label: Buy 100 of Grainger part 1A123 now on my behalf
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude cannot make purchases — no access to external websites, account login, or payment processing. Directed user to grainger.com to search part 1A123.
